title: convolvulus compactus subsp. parnassicus
intro: Convolvulus compactus subsp. parnassicus is a perennial herb plant belonging to the Convolvulaceae family, native to Greece and Turkey. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus compactus subsp. parnassicus include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Convolvulus compactus subsp. parnassicus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
